symptom: Large legacy client remains alongside new shell/interactive layering; migration incomplete
impact: High churn and duplicated responsibilities across routes
fix_action: Collapse to a single canonical route composition and decommission legacy duplicated client paths

symptom: Legacy monolithic client retained while new shell/interactive wrappers exist
impact: Refactor complexity and regression risk remain high
fix_action: Split domain logic and remove duplicated pathways after parity checks

symptom: Monolithic interactive client still carries heavy mixed responsibilities
impact: Hard to reason about and repeatedly tweak without regressions
fix_action: Extract decision engine and thin presentation containers

symptom: Large route client indicates incomplete modularization
impact: UI changes keep impacting analytics logic and vice versa
fix_action: Enforce route contract with strict boundaries

symptom: Monolithic component structure persists in new architecture
impact: Sustains symptom-fix loop
fix_action: Move to deterministic decision-engine + view contract

symptom: Large mixed-concern component still central to route behavior
impact: Analytics depth changes remain costly and fragile
fix_action: Refactor into tested domain layer and smaller render modules

symptom: Client-side validated fetch hook remains but is not referenced
impact: Confusing parallel data-loading paradigms
fix_action: Remove or formally deprecate and document canonical server-loader path

symptom: Deferred component exists but is not consumed by home route
impact: Performance strategy is partial and inconsistent
fix_action: Use deferred component in route or remove dead artifact

symptom: Deferred wrapper is present but not connected
impact: Missed performance opportunity and architecture ambiguity
fix_action: Wire into route-level budgeted loading path or remove

symptom: Shared frame enforces near-identical section hierarchy across all projects
impact: Projects look same despite color/font changes
fix_action: Create per-project frame variants with distinct layout grammar

symptom: Generic sparkline reused as primary analytical visual in all project shells
impact: Visual and analytical differentiation collapse into one template
fix_action: Replace with project-specific primary chart components

symptom: Fixed dimensions and minimal axis semantics limit readability on dense narratives
impact: Charts appear tiny/generic and low-information
fix_action: Adopt responsive chart grammar with explicit scales, annotations, and axis metadata

symptom: Single wrapper pattern standardizes all chapter presentations
impact: Route identity remains superficial

symptom: Global panel classes (.panel/.glass/.neo-panel) dominate route aesthetics
impact: Per-route theming cannot override shared visual skeleton
fix_action: Limit global styles to primitives and move chapter grammar to route scope

symptom: Strong shared panel treatment repeats across all chapters
impact: Repeated card language drives AI-template look
fix_action: Define per-project panel systems and token packs

symptom: Color-name accent enum no longer matches intended semantic styling
impact: Inconsistent and misleading token behavior
fix_action: Move to semantic role tokens and update all mappings

symptom: Accent mapping remaps cyan to amber-style classnames
impact: Semantic token drift creates maintenance confusion
fix_action: Refactor to semantic tokens and remove color-name remapping

symptom: Global body class still defaults to sans-first regardless of desired serif-led system
impact: Brand typography intent not enforced
fix_action: Define global typography role contract and enforce per-role usage

symptom: Body font hard-coded to Instrument Sans in CSS
impact: Runtime class/font-var combos can conflict with requested hierarchy
fix_action: Move body font ownership to one authoritative contract

symptom: Route font selection ad hoc and not governed by a documented matrix
impact: Repeated subjective rework of typography
fix_action: Create audited font matrix and route validation checks

symptom: Route uses unrelated font without global typography policy enforcement
impact: Typography changes feel arbitrary between iterations

symptom: Project font override applied without measurable acceptance criteria
impact: User expectations and implementation diverge repeatedly
fix_action: Add typography QA gates and approval rubric

symptom: Repo documentation states synthetic default while runtime presents real-feed health panels
impact: User trust erodes due to contradictory claims
fix_action: Unify data policy docs with runtime mode and explicit badge

symptom: UI claims decision modules stay usable via baseline payload fallback
impact: Conflicts with strict real-only expectations in prior discussions
fix_action: Bind copy to an explicit runtime policy mode

symptom: Fallback narrative always presented when usableCount==0 path triggers
impact: Perceived inconsistency around unavailable vs usable states
fix_action: Display strict/partial/fallback mode explicitly and consistently

symptom: Stale-cache fallback path silently patches unavailable real signals
impact: Real-data integrity semantics become ambiguous
fix_action: Separate strict and fallback pipelines with explicit manifests

symptom: Baseline fallback path mutates unavailable status to stale with baseline values
impact: Can mask live feed outages unless mode is explicit
fix_action: Gate fallback behind explicit runtime mode and UI watermark

symptom: Both strict and fallback script modes coexist without one canonical default policy
impact: Teams run different modes and get different UX states
fix_action: Define and enforce one default mode per environment

symptom: Viewmodel computes only simple aggregate lift
impact: Decision narrative depth remains shallow
fix_action: Implement domain decision engine with sensitivity/confidence outputs

impact: Forensic narrative lacks richer modeled outputs
fix_action: Add calibrated risk decomposition and scenario deltas

impact: Portfolio analysis appears simplistic
fix_action: Compute multi-objective frontier outputs with uncertainty

symptom: Portfolio KPI is only total delta aggregation
impact: Insufficient causal depth in decision outputs
fix_action: Introduce store-level causal confidence and action rationales

symptom: Only first evidence item is rendered (evidence[0])
impact: Decision explainability is artificially truncated
fix_action: Support ranked evidence list and drilldown controls

symptom: Empty annotation fallback text appears when chapter annotations absent
impact: Narrative continuity breaks and feels placeholder-like
fix_action: Enforce minimum annotation density per chapter or hide module conditionally

symptom: Home route mounts heavy interactive module directly
impact: Higher initial JS/hydration burden on landing route
fix_action: Use deferred dynamic module with intersection gate

symptom: Signal wall rendered eagerly despite deferred wrapper availability
impact: Perceived slowness on first load
fix_action: Move to deferred load strategy with SSR preview/fallback

impact: Mobile and above-fold payload/paint pressure increased
fix_action: Make map height responsive with reduced mobile defaults

symptom: Static rootMargin can activate expensive sections too early on smaller viewports
impact: Unpredictable mount timing and resource spikes
fix_action: Tune rootMargin per route/device and instrument metrics

symptom: Asset generation pipeline exists without typed frontend consumption contract
impact: Generated assets do not reliably improve rendered experience
fix_action: Create runtime asset registry and route-level fallback policy

symptom: Manifest prompt uses electric-blue styling language that conflicts with current palette direction
impact: Generated media can regress approved aesthetic
fix_action: Update manifest taxonomy to approved design tokens

symptom: Prompt language still aligned to rejected cyan-heavy visual direction
impact: Design drift reintroduced via generation pipeline
fix_action: Align prompts with governed style guide

symptom: E2E validates presence and console hygiene but not analytical correctness
impact: Visual/depth regressions can pass CI
fix_action: Add scenario-delta and KPI consistency assertions

symptom: Schema tests ensure shape validity only
impact: Weak protection against semantic/model regressions
fix_action: Add semantic invariants and cross-field consistency tests

symptom: Finance tests are minimal and do not cover decision-engine outputs
impact: Analytical layer can drift unnoticed
fix_action: Add project-specific metric and boundary-condition tests

symptom: No performance or visual regression budgets enforced in CI
impact: Slow/ugly builds can still pass
fix_action: Add budget assertions and screenshot diff checks

symptom: Runtime cache artifact present in working directory
impact: Noise and reproducibility drift during iteration
fix_action: Purge cache artifacts and enforce cleanup hook

symptom: Generated bytecode artifacts present under source tree
impact: Repository hygiene degrades over time
fix_action: Add stronger ignore and cleanup checks

symptom: Local secrets file exists in repo root (not tracked but high-risk path)
impact: Operational security risk if handling slips
fix_action: Keep out of tracked files and add pre-commit secret scan

symptom: Accumulating run snapshots in repo workspace can cause history clutter
impact: Repo bloat and noisy diffs
fix_action: Define retention policy and archival strategy

symptom: Route backdrops differ mainly by tint map rather than composition logic
impact: Perceived thematic sameness persists
fix_action: Introduce route-specific backdrop renderers with unique geometry

symptom: Global reveal profile still used on home and index routes
impact: Motion language feels generic
fix_action: Adopt route-specific motion presets across all critical sections

symptom: Profiles vary timing but not deeper choreography grammar
impact: Motion differentiation remains subtle
fix_action: Expand profile-specific choreography and component-level motion contracts
